title: 2 months and 2 days
excerpt: Jack is 2 months and 2 days old. We've made it past his first immunizations, which happened on Monday and are enjoying every moment (except for maybe the 2 pokes in his legs that I couldn't even watch. Thank goodness…
body:
Jack is 2 months and 2 days old. We've made it past his first immunizations, which happened on Monday and are enjoying every moment (except for maybe the 2 pokes in his legs that I couldn't even watch. Thank goodness for his amazing daddy who was right by his side cheering him on through the loud cries.) Jack's been in our lives such a short time - that is flying by, and he is so very loved…

...by so many people. And of course dogs.
